reference_answer: Overfitting is when a model fits training data too closely and generalizes poorly.
Overfitting model mashg'ulot ma'lumotlariga haddan tashqari moslashib qolgan holatdir.
Philosophy studies fundamental questions about knowledge, reality, and ethics.
Falsafa bilim, voqelik va axloq haqidagi asosiy savollarni o'rganadi.
